message:
Running command: # SYNTHESIS DONE - LibreLane now at step 08-openroad-staprepnr!
# Steps 03-08 completed. Now entering main PnR flow (floorplan/placement/routing).
# Monitor intensively - 5-min polls.

WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_wrapper.log"
LR_PID=286668

echo "=== PnR in progress! $(date) ==="
echo "Monitoring every 5 min until final GDS appears or LR exits..."

for i in $(seq 1 180); do
  sleep 300
  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -2 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' '|' | cut -c1-100)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  STEP_COUNT=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^[0-9]" || echo 0)
  OR=$(pgrep -f "openroad" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] poll=$i | LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) | step=$STEP ($STEP_COUNT total) | log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES 2>/dev/null) OR=${OR:-none}"
  echo "  log: $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** FINAL GDS READY: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    echo ""
    echo "Run directory:"
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -40
    echo ""
    echo "Final dir:"
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" -name "*.gds" -o -name "*.lef" -o -name "*.lib" 2>/dev/null | head -15
    echo ""
    echo "Last 60 log lines:"
    tail -60 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done

message.content: Synthesis is **complete** — LibreLane has already advanced to **step 08 (OpenROAD pre-PnR STA)**. The flow is running. Now monitoring for all PnR steps.

function.name: execute_bash
